input.initialPrompt: I want to run these tests with dotnet test and collect a crash dump if any test crashes the host.

data.reasoningText: The user wants to run their .NET tests with `dotnet test` and collect a crash dump if any test crashes the host. Let me first look at the project files to understand the setup, then run the tests with the appropriate blame-crash options.

data.content:
All tests passed. The command used was:

```
dotnet test --blame-crash
```

Since this project uses **MTP** (`TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport`), `--blame-crash` enables the crash dump collector. If the test host process crashes, a dump file will be written to the `TestResults` directory for post-mortem analysis.

You can also specify the dump type (e.g., full heap dump) with:

```
dotnet test --blame-crash --blame-crash-dump-type full
```
